title: Early Years Practitioner
description: We are looking for a passionate Early Years Practitioner to join our dedicated team. You will support children aged 0–5 in their learning and development, creating a safe and nurturing environment.
requirements: Level 3 Early Years qualification or above

title: Room Leader – Toddler Room
description: An exciting opportunity for an experienced Room Leader to manage our busy toddler room. You will lead a small team, plan activities, and liaise with parents and carers.

title: Special Educational Needs (SEN) Support Worker
description: We are seeking a compassionate SEN Support Worker to work alongside children with additional needs, helping them access learning and thrive in our inclusive setting.
requirements: Understanding of SEND Code of Practice
